mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TERMS (TERMS_TYPE, VERSION, TITLE, CONTENT, IS_REQUIRED, IS_ACTIVE, EFFECTIVE_AT) VALUES (#{termsType}, #{version}, #{title}, #{content}, #{isRequired}, #{isActive}, #{effectiveAt})
mapper.select: SELECT ID, TERMS_TYPE, VERSION, TITLE, CONTENT, IS_REQUIRED, IS_ACTIVE, EFFECTIVE_AT, CREATED_AT FROM TERMS WHERE IS_ACTIVE = 1 ORDER BY TERMS_TYPE, EFFECTIVE_AT DESC
SELECT ID, TERMS_TYPE, VERSION, TITLE, CONTENT, IS_REQUIRED, IS_ACTIVE, EFFECTIVE_AT, CREATED_AT FROM TERMS WHERE TERMS_TYPE = #{termsType} AND IS_ACTIVE = 1
